blocked_until: or explicit lead priority override for mechanics before visual baseline acceptance

core_loop_chain: completed tick grants node mastery XP
tier threshold check resolves immediately after XP increment
interval bonus applies from the next mining cycle
node row and progress timing show the before/after benefit

state_contract.implementation_guard: Current persistent state/game_state.schema.json is still seed-level. Before implementing T0012, choose and record whether Mine Cards mastery state becomes schema-backed persistent state or remains game-local runtime state for the slice.

tier_up_feedback: reward log row: Surface Stone Mastery I
must not cover next goal panel
before_after: fallback label +3% faster if numeric delta is too subtle

live_state_matrix_additions.description: Surface Stone has 8-9/10 mastery XP and shows the next tier is close.
A completed tick reaches 10 mastery XP, upgrades Surface Stone to Mastery I, and emits feedback once.
Surface Stone shows M1 and the faster interval after the tier-up.

acceptance_questions: Can a new player tell that repeating Surface Stone produced a milestone?
Can they see what changed numerically or as a +3% faster label?
Does mastery support the Copper Pickaxe goal instead of distracting from it?
Does the screen still read as Mining rather than a spreadsheet?
